revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''7-3-460

Application of paint in accordance with an agreed specification by brush, roller or spray to provide corrosion protection and/or surface decoration.


Note: The German term anstreichen is limited to brush or roller application.
